title: [codereview2] coap_status.c still contains hundreds of non-SPDX comments and section separators violating Zephyr/no-comment rule from q7ij/s7t8
description: The c file has extensive Doxygen, SECURITY notes, ASCII art separators, inline comments. Must remove all non-SPDX comments entirely to match the header cleanup and bead requirements. Also add capacity check in neighbors_get for count > CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_STATUS_MAX_NEIGHBORS returning error code.
